name: workflow-position
question: Where is this project in the LDIS/LTADS workflow, and what is the next /0-uldf-proceed step?

schema.position: one of: NONE, POST-IDEATE, POST-INTAKE, POST-SPEC, POST-PLAN, IN-EXECUTION, POST-IMPLEMENTATION, UNKNOWN

fallback: Inspect docs/planning/intakes/, docs/planning/plans/, docs/specs/SPECIFICATION.md, and ltads/sessions/current-session.md to manually derive position. See /0-uldf-proceed.md Phase 1 Step 1.2 for the resolution rule.

provenance.note: Pre-answers the question /0-uldf-proceed Phase 1 Step 1.2 asks by artifact inspection. Surfaces a proceed_hint in the session-start briefing so agents recognize workflow boundaries proactively.
